  institution_name varchar [note: 'Name of the parent institution or organization to which this ethics committee is affiliated (e.g., \'Mayo Clinic\', \'University of Oxford\', \'Charité – Universitätsmedizin Berlin\'). Distinguishes institutional IRBs/IECs from independent/central committees.']
  is_central_irb boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ethics committee serves as a central IRB/IEC providing oversight for multiple investigational sites under a single review, as permitted by the NIH Single IRB Policy and 21st Century Cures Act. True = central/single IRB model; False = site-specific review.']
  jurisdiction_description varchar [note: 'Free-text description of the geographic or institutional jurisdiction covered by the ethics committee (e.g., \'State of Minnesota, USA\', \'European Union member states\', \'Federal Republic of Germany\'). Complements country_code with sub-national or multi-national scope details.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'BCP 47 language tag representing the primary language in which submissions must be prepared for this ethics committee (e.g., \'en\', \'de\', \'fr\', \'ja\'). Drives ICF translation requirements and document preparation workflows.']
  mailing_address varchar [note: 'Full mailing address of the ethics committee office, used for formal regulatory correspondence, submission packages, and TMF documentation. Classified as confidential organizational contact data.']
  meeting_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which the full ethics committee convenes for protocol review meetings. Informs submission timing strategy and study startup timeline planning. Expedited review may be available between scheduled meetings.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for capturing additional operational notes, special submission requirements, known committee preferences, or historical context relevant to working with this ethics committee. Not used for structured data.']
  oversight_scope varchar [note: 'Defines the specific protocols, studies, or investigational sites within the clinical program that this ethics committee is responsible for reviewing and overseeing. Belongs to the engagement, not to either entity alone.']
  primary_contact varchar [note: 'The designated contact person at the ethics committee who is responsible for communications related to this specific clinical program. Distinct from the general committee contact_email on the ethics_committee master record, as this is program-specific.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official government or regulatory registration number for the IRB or IEC (e.g., OHRP-assigned IRB registration number in the format \'IRB00XXXXXX\', or EU national competent authority registration). Required for IND applications, regulatory submissions, and eTMF documentation.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory authority under whose framework this ethics committee operates and is recognized (e.g., FDA for U.S. IRBs under 21 CFR Part 56, EMA for EU IECs under EU CTR 536/2014). Determines applicable GCP standards and submission requirements. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|EMA|MHRA|PMDA|TGA|Health_Canada|OHRP|Other — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  requires_local_pi_signature boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ethics committee requires the local Principal Investigator (PI) to co-sign the ethics application or ICF submission. True = local PI signature mandatory; False = sponsor or CRO signature sufficient. Affects site activation workflows.']
  review_turnaround_days varchar [note: 'Standard number of calendar days the ethics committee requires to complete initial protocol review from submission date. Used in study timeline planning, site feasibility assessments, and KPI tracking for enrollment readiness.']
  sae_reporting_timeframe_days varchar [note: 'Number of calendar days within which Serious Adverse Events (SAEs) and SUSARs must be reported to this ethics committee following identification. Varies by committee and jurisdiction; drives safety reporting workflow configuration in Oracle Argus Safety.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State, province, or sub-national administrative region where the ethics committee is located. Relevant for U.S. state-level IRB regulations and Canadian provincial health research ethics requirements.']
  submission_method varchar [note: 'Preferred or required method for submitting protocol applications, amendments, and safety reports to this ethics committee: \'electronic\' (via online portal or eTMF), \'paper\' (physical documents), or \'hybrid\' (combination). Drives submission workflow configuration in Veeva Vault and CTMS.']
  submission_portal_url varchar [note: 'URL of the ethics committee\'s electronic submission portal or online application system. Used by CRAs and regulatory affairs teams to route submissions and track application status.']
  submission_strategy varchar [note: 'The agreed or required approach for submitting protocol amendments, safety reports, and annual reviews to this ethics committee for this specific program. May differ by committee and program based on regulatory jurisdiction and committee preferences.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the ethics committee master record was last modified, in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Supports audit trail requirements under 21 CFR Part 11 and ALCOA+ principles.']
  veeva_vault_record_number varchar [note: 'Unique record identifier for this ethics committee in Veeva Vault eTMF, used to cross-reference TMF documents, ethics approval letters, and correspondence stored in the document management system.']

  Note: 'Master record for each IRB or IEC body providing ethical oversight for clinical trials, capturing committee name, type, jurisdiction, and accreditation status'
}

Table compliance.ethics_submission {
  ethics_submission_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for each ethics submission record in the lakehouse silver layer. Primary key for this entity.']
  country_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to study.country. Business justification: Ethics submissions are country-specific regulatory requirements. Linking to the study country record enables country-level submission status tracking, CTA milestone reporting, and regulatory timeline ']
  ethics_committee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the Institutional Review Board (IRB) or Independent Ethics Committee (IEC) to which this submission is directed. Links to the ethics committee master record.']
  parent_submission_ethics_submission_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the original or preceding ethics submission that this record amends or continues. Enables lineage tracking across the full submission history for a study.']
  primary_amended_ethics_submission_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on ethics_submission (amended_ethics_submission_id)']
  principal_investigator_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the Principal Investigator (PI) named on this ethics submission. The PI is the party responsible for the conduct of the study at the site.']
  study_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the clinical study for which this ethics submission is made. Links to the study master record.']
  study_site_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the investigational site associated with this ethics submission. Applicable when the submission is site-specific (e.g., local IRB/IEC review).']
  tmf_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to document.tmf_document. Business justification: IRB/IEC submissions are essential TMF documents (ICH GCP E6 Section 8, TMF Zone 1). A clinical operations expert expects this link to verify ethics submission documents are filed and complete. tmf_doc']
  approval_expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the current IRB or IEC approval expires, triggering the need for a continuing review submission to maintain authorization for study conduct.']
  conditions_of_approval varchar [note: 'Free-text description of any conditions, stipulations, or modifications required by the IRB or IEC as part of a conditional approval decision. Must be addressed before study initiation or continuation.']
  continuing_review_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the next continuing review submission must be filed with the IRB or IEC to maintain uninterrupted approval. Calculated from the approval expiry date minus any required lead time.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this ethics submission record was first created in the system. Supports ALCOA+ data integrity principles and audit trail requirements.']
  decision_date date [note: 'Date on which the IRB or IEC issued its formal decision (approval, conditional approval, rejection, or other outcome) on this submission.']
  decision_outcome varchar [note: 'The formal decision rendered by the IRB or IEC on this submission. Drives downstream study activation, amendment implementation, and regulatory reporting.']
  inspection_readiness_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ethics submission record and its associated documentation are complete and ready for regulatory inspection review. Used in audit readiness dashboards.']
  irb_iec_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the IRB or IEC receiving this submission. Retained directly on the record for reporting and audit trail purposes independent of the master reference.']
  irb_iec_reference_number varchar [note: 'Reference or tracking number assigned by the IRB or IEC upon receipt of the submission. Used for all correspondence and follow-up with the ethics committee.']
  pi_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the Principal Investigator (PI) as listed on the ethics submission. Retained directly on the record for audit trail and regulatory correspondence.']
  protocol_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the study protocol included in this submission package (e.g., v1.0, v2.1). Critical for linking the submission to the exact protocol document reviewed.']
  receipt_confirmed_date date [note: 'Date on which the IRB or IEC formally acknowledged receipt of the submission package. Marks the start of the review clock for regulatory timeline tracking.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'The national or regional regulatory authority whose requirements govern this ethics submission. Determines applicable reporting timelines and documentation standards. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|EMA|MHRA|PMDA|TGA|Health_Canada|ANVISA|other — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  response_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the sponsor or investigator must respond to IRB or IEC queries, conditions, or requests for additional information following a conditional approval or deferral.']
  response_submitted_date date [note: 'Date on which the sponsor or investigator submitted a formal response to IRB or IEC queries or conditions of approval.']
  review_deadline_date date [note: 'Target date by which the IRB or IEC is expected to complete its review and issue a decision, based on regulatory timelines or committee meeting schedules.']
  review_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the review procedure applied by the IRB or IEC (e.g., full board convened review, expedited review for minimal-risk studies, exempt determination). Determines regulatory timelines and quorum requirements.']
  subject_enrollment_authorized boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ethics approval authorizes the enrollment of new subjects at the site. False for submissions that do not grant or maintain enrollment authorization (e.g., pending conditions).']
  submission_category varchar [note: 'Detailed categorization of the submission content beyond the submission type, enabling granular tracking of what changed or was reported. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: initial_application|protocol_amendment|icf_amendment|safety_update|annual_renewal|study_closure|deviation_report|investigator_brochure_update|consent_form_update — promote to reference product]']
  submission_date date [note: 'The date on which the submission package was formally transmitted to the IRB or IEC. This is the principal real-world business event date for this transaction.']
  submission_method varchar [note: 'The channel or mechanism used to transmit the submission package to the IRB or IEC (e.g., electronic portal, paper, email). Relevant for 21 CFR Part 11 compliance and audit trail.']
  submission_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for capturing additional context, cover letter summary, or operational notes related to this ethics submission that are not captured in structured fields.']
  submission_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known, human-readable reference number assigned to this submission package (e.g., IRB-2024-0042-A01). Used for tracking across systems and correspondence with the ethics committee.']
  submission_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the ethics submission package from preparation through final ethics committee decision. Drives workflow and compliance tracking. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|under_review|approved|conditionally_approved|rejected|withdrawn — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  submission_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the submission package by its purpose in the IRB/IEC review lifecycle. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: initial_review|amendment|continuing_review|safety_report|closure|waiver_request|expedited_review|deviation_report — promote to reference product]']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to this ethics submission record. Supports ALCOA+ data integrity principles and change tracking for GCP compliance.']
  veeva_vault_document_number varchar [note: 'Unique document identifier in Veeva Vault eTMF for the submission package. Provides direct linkage to the source document management system for audit and inspection purposes.']
  waiver_granted boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the IRB or IEC granted a waiver of informed consent or waiver of documentation of informed consent as part of this submission decision.']

  Note: 'Tracks each formal submission package sent to an IRB or IEC for a specific study, including initial review, amendments, and continuing review submissions'
}

Table compliance.ethics_approval {
  ethics_approval_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for the ethics approval record in the lakehouse silver layer. Primary key for this entity.']
  country_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to study.country. Business justification: Ethics approvals are country-specific. Linking to the study country record supports country-level approval status dashboards, enrollment authorization tracking, and regulatory submission timelines. ir']
  ethics_committee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the IRB or IEC body that issued this approval decision. Links to the ethics committee master record.']
  ethics_submission_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.ethics_submission. Business justification: An ethics approval is the formal decision resulting from an ethics submission. Every approval originates from a specific submission package. This is a natural parent-child relationship (submission is ']
  protocol_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to study.protocol. Business justification: Ethics approvals are granted for a specific protocol version — a core GCP requirement. Direct FK to protocol enables protocol-version-level approval status tracking, supports site activation workflows']
  regulatory_binder_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to document.regulatory_binder. Business justification: Ethics approvals are included in regulatory submission binders (IND, CTA, NDA packages). A regulatory affairs expert expects this link to confirm ethics approvals are captured in the correct regulator']
  study_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the clinical study for which this ethics approval was issued. Links the approval to the study master record.']
  study_protocol_amendment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to study.study_protocol_amendment. Business justification: Ethics approvals are granted for specific protocol amendments. Direct FK to study_protocol_amendment enables amendment-level approval status tracking, supports site notification workflows (sites must ']
  study_site_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the investigational site for which this ethics approval applies. Null if the approval is a central/multi-site approval covering all sites.']
  superseded_ethics_approval_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on ethics_approval (superseded_ethics_approval_id)']
  tmf_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to document.tmf_document. Business justification: IRB/IEC approvals are essential TMF documents required by ICH GCP E6 and FDA 21 CFR Part 312. A clinical operations expert expects this link for TMF zone 1 completeness verification and inspection rea']
  approval_conditions varchar [note: 'Free-text description of any conditions, stipulations, or modifications required by the IRB/IEC as part of a conditional approval. Null for unconditional approvals.']
  approval_letter_date date [note: 'The date printed on the official ethics approval letter issued by the IRB/IEC. May differ from decision_date if the letter is issued after the meeting.']
  approval_reference_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique reference number assigned by the Institutional Review Board (IRB) or Independent Ethics Committee (IEC) to this approval decision. Used for regulatory correspondence and audit trail.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the ethics approval decision. Approved indicates unconditional approval; approved_with_conditions requires sponsor/PI to satisfy stated conditions; deferred means the committee requires additional information before deciding; disapproved means the committee rejected the submission; withdrawn means the sponsor withdrew the submission; expired means the approval period has lapsed without renewal. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: approved|approved_with_conditions|pending|deferred|disapproved|withdrawn|expired — promote to reference product]']
  approval_type varchar [note: 'Categorises the review pathway used by the IRB/IEC: full board review, expedited review, exempt determination, central ethics committee review, or local site-level review.']
  conditions_met_date date [note: 'The date on which the sponsor or PI confirmed that all IRB/IEC-stipulated conditions for a conditional approval were satisfied, enabling the study to proceed.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this ethics approval record was first created in the system, conforming to ALCOA+ (Attributable, Legible, Contemporaneous, Original, Accurate) data integrity principles.']
  ctms_record_number varchar [note: 'Record identifier in Oracle Siebel CTMS where this ethics approval is tracked for site activation and monitoring workflows.']
  decision_date date [note: 'The date on which the IRB/IEC formally issued its approval decision. This is the principal real-world event date for this transaction.']
  disapproval_reason varchar [note: 'Free-text reason provided by the IRB/IEC when the submission was disapproved or deferred. Null for approved submissions.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date from which the ethics approval is binding and the study or amendment may commence at the site. May differ from decision_date if conditions must be met first.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'The date on which the ethics approval expires and must be renewed for the study to continue. Null for approvals with no defined expiry. Drives renewal workflow triggers.']
  gdpr_applicable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether GDPR data protection requirements apply to this ethics approval, relevant for studies conducted in EU/EEA jurisdictions.']
  hipaa_applicable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether HIPAA privacy rule requirements apply to this ethics approval, relevant for studies conducted in the United States.']
  icf_approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the specific ICF version was approved by the IRB/IEC. May differ from the overall protocol decision_date when ICF and protocol are reviewed separately.']
  icf_version_approved varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the Informed Consent Form (ICF) that was reviewed and approved as part of this ethics submission. Null if the submission did not include an ICF.']
  irb_iec_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the IRB or IEC that issued this approval. Retained as a denormalized reference for reporting and regulatory submissions.']
  irb_iec_registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration or accreditation number of the IRB/IEC as assigned by the relevant regulatory authority (e.g., FDA OHRP registration number, EMA ethics committee identifier).']
  pi_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the Principal Investigator (PI) named on the ethics approval. Retained as a denormalized field for regulatory correspondence and inspection readiness.']
  protocol_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the study protocol document that was reviewed and approved. Enables tracking of which protocol version holds active ethics approval.']
  quorum_met_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the required quorum of IRB/IEC members was present at the review meeting, as required for a valid approval decision.']
  regulatory_authority_notification_date date [note: 'Date on which the regulatory authority was notified of the IRB/IEC approval decision. Null if regulatory_authority_notified_flag is False.']
  regulatory_authority_notified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the relevant regulatory authority (e.g., FDA, EMA, MHRA) was notified of the IRB/IEC approval decision as required by applicable regulations.']
  renewal_due_date date [note: 'The date by which a renewal submission must be received by the IRB/IEC to maintain continuous approval. Typically calculated from expiry_date minus the committee\'s required lead time.']
  review_meeting_date date [note: 'The date of the IRB/IEC board meeting at which this submission was formally reviewed and voted upon.']
  submission_date date [note: 'The date on which the sponsor or Principal Investigator (PI) submitted the protocol, amendment, or ICF to the IRB/IEC for review.']
  submission_type varchar [note: 'Classifies the type of submission reviewed by the IRB/IEC: initial protocol review, protocol amendment, annual renewal, safety report, Informed Consent Form (ICF) revision, or other. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: initial|amendment|renewal|safety_report|icf_revision|other — promote to reference product if additional types are needed]']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to this ethics approval record. Supports audit trail and data lineage requirements per ALCOA+ principles.']
  vote_abstain_count varchar [note: 'Number of IRB/IEC board members who abstained from voting at the review meeting.']
  vote_against_count varchar [note: 'Number of IRB/IEC board members who voted against approval at the review meeting.']
  vote_in_favor_count varchar [note: 'Number of IRB/IEC board members who voted in favor of approval at the review meeting. Supports audit trail and quorum verification.']
  vulnerable_population_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the approved study involves vulnerable populations (e.g., minors, pregnant women, prisoners, cognitively impaired individuals) requiring additional IRB/IEC safeguards.']
  waiver_of_consent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the IRB/IEC granted a waiver or alteration of the informed consent requirement as part of this approval.']

  Note: 'Records the formal approval decision issued by an IRB or IEC for a study protocol, ICF, or amendment including approval conditions and expiry dates'
}
